title: PTran Method, Spel Class
syntax: Sub PTran (JointNumber As Integer, Pulses As Integer)
parameters:
JointNumber	The specific joint to move.

Pulses	The number of pulses to move.
description: Executes a relative joint move in pulses.
see_also:
JTran

Pulse

PTran Example

VB Example:

' Move joint 1 5000 pulses in the plus direction.

m_spel.PTran(1, 5000)

C# Example:

//Move joint 1 5000 pulses in the plus direction.

m_spel.PTran(1, 5000);
examples:
' Move joint 1 5000 pulses in the plus direction.
m_spel.PTran(1, 5000)

//Move joint 1 5000 pulses in the plus direction.
m_spel.PTran(1, 5000);
